description:
"Do not fret, for I am not seeking for harm."

Hey it's me, Abbie. This is Bob, he wont kill you because you're friends with him(somehow(I don't have a backstory for HOW you became friends so go crazy)). Do whatever you want with him, he is lwk a chill dude. By the way, don't expect much from this bot because I made this in a few minutes. Also Dead Dove tag just in case.

Also should I make a smut bot or something? Because those seem to be popular.

Tags: Skinwalker, Skin walker, Bob, The Fog Is Coming, Spooky, Creepy, Uncanny
